name: Graph Health
description: Bundled routine template for inspecting an exograph's link and maintenance health.

capabilities.label: Graph Health
capabilities.description: Audit selected notes for orphaned pages, stale markers, unresolved links, and missing source context.

routineTemplate.prompt: Audit the selected exograph scope. Report orphaned notes, unresolved links, stale markers, low-confidence agent-authored notes, missing source context, and suggested follow-up maintenance actions. Do not modify files unless the routine output policy explicitly permits proposed changes.
